feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: Vulkan Arena
Start: 2026-09-12 20:00
Tags: R&B, Rap


R&B Fest Is Coming To Oslo!

Get ready to indulge in the ultimate Old School R&B experience that will leave you dancing all night long!

Our DJs are set to spin all the classic R&B anthems, with our Host keeping the energy up with singalongs and dances. Relive the 90s and 00s era with dancers, confetti showers, inflatable microphones and much more

Date: Saturday 12th September 2026 Venue: Vulkan Arena, Vulkan 26, 0178 Oslo, Norway Time: 8pm - 1am Last Entry: 9:30pm

Join us for a night of unforgettable memories, infectious rhythms, and pure R&B magic.

IMPORTANT INFO: • This Is A DJ Club Night, The Artists Pictured In Our Event Artwork Are Not Performing • This Event Is 18+ (Adults Only)

CONTACT US: • Please Contact Us Via Our Contact Page On Our Website: www.rnb-festival.com/pages/contact • We Aim To Respond To All Enquiries Within 48 Hours (excluding weekends & public holidays)


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.summary: R&B Fest Is Coming To Oslo! at Vulkan Arena on 2026-09-12 20:00
entry.title: R&B Fest Is Coming To Oslo! (2026-09-12)
